items.title: Dashboard Development
items.summary: Kino may assist with dashboard development for KPI monitoring, performance visibility, operational tracking, and digital activity reporting.
items.summaryFilipino: Kaya ni Kino mag-assist sa dashboard development para sa KPI monitoring, performance visibility, operational tracking, at digital activity reporting.

items.title: Python Automation
items.summary: Kino may assist with Python automation for repetitive reporting, file processing, data extraction, and workflow improvement.
items.summaryFilipino: Kaya ni Kino mag-assist sa Python automation para sa repetitive reporting, file processing, data extraction, at workflow improvement.

items.title: Reporting Workflow Improvement
items.summary: Kino may assist with reporting workflows that convert raw files into structured Excel, CSV, XLSX, dashboard, or management-ready outputs.
items.summaryFilipino: Kaya ni Kino mag-assist sa reporting workflows na nagko-convert ng raw files into structured Excel, CSV, XLSX, dashboard, o management-ready outputs.

items.title: Virtual Assistance and Business Support
items.summary: Kino may assist with customer and CRM support, account and record updates, calls/email/SMS communication, spreadsheet tracking, data entry, inbox and calendar coordination, and document preparation.
items.summaryFilipino: Kaya ni Kino mag-assist sa customer at CRM support, account at record updates, calls/email/SMS communication, spreadsheet tracking, data entry, inbox at calendar coordination, at document preparation.

items.title: AI Portfolio Chatbot Setup
items.summary: Kino's portfolio now demonstrates a client-facing AI assistant concept with knowledge-base answers, suggested questions, service recommendations, and lead capture flow.
items.summaryFilipino: Ipinapakita ng portfolio ni Kino ang client-facing AI assistant concept na may knowledge-base answers, suggested questions, service recommendations, at lead capture flow.

items.title: Data Validation and Cleanup
items.summary: Kino may assist with data validation and cleanup workflows that improve report consistency and reduce manual checking.
items.summaryFilipino: Kaya ni Kino mag-assist sa data validation at cleanup workflows para mapaganda ang report consistency at mabawasan ang manual checking.
